title: Carry out inspection of designated area
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out inspection of designated area demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Define area and target of inspection

pcs.text: Confirm location and size of area to be inspected
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm location and size of area to be inspected?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm location and size of area to be inspected.

pcs.text: Identify features of natural environment in target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify features of natural environment in target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify features of natural environment in target area.

pcs.text: Set frequency of inspection according to management strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set frequency of inspection according to management strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set frequency of inspection according to management strategy.

pcs.text: Determine targets of inspection from management strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine targets of inspection from management strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine targets of inspection from management strategy.

pcs.text: Confirm characteristics and favoured conditions for targets with management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm characteristics and favoured conditions for targets with management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm characteristics and favoured conditions for targets with management.
